title: 消息角色交替规则：为什么 API 报错 400？
title_en: Role Alternation Rule: Why Is the API Returning 400?

body.problem: 用 Messages API 构建多轮对话时，不确定 messages 数组该怎么组织。常见困惑：消息历史是否需要严格交替？assistant 消息是否必须来自真实的 Claude 响应？
body.solution: Messages API 是无状态的——每次调用都需要发送完整的对话历史。关键规则：(1) 你可以使用 synthetic assistant messages（人工构造的 assistant 消息）来引导对话；(2) 对话历史中的 assistant 消息不必来自真实的 Claude 响应；(3) 如果需要 Claude 以特定方式开场，用 system 参数设定角色，或在末尾放一条 assistant 消息进行 prefill。注意：实践中连续相同 role 的消息可能导致 400 错误，建议保持 user/assistant 交替排列。
body.keyTakeaway: Messages API 无状态，每次发完整历史。可以用 synthetic assistant messages 构造上下文，保持 user/assistant 交替排列。

body_en.problem: When building multi-turn conversations with the Messages API, it's unclear how to organize the messages array. Common questions: must messages strictly alternate? Must assistant messages come from real Claude responses?
body_en.solution: The Messages API is stateless — you send the full conversation history with every call. Key rules: (1) you can use synthetic assistant messages (manually constructed) to guide the conversation; (2) assistant messages in the history don't have to come from real Claude responses; (3) if you need Claude to start in a specific way, use the system parameter for role-setting, or place an assistant message at the end for prefill. Note: in practice, consecutive messages with the same role may cause 400 errors, so maintain user/assistant alternation.
body_en.keyTakeaway: Messages API is stateless — send full history each time. You can use synthetic assistant messages to shape context; keep user/assistant alternation.
